directors.profile: Nandan Nilekani is a co-founder of Infosys and has served as its CEO from 2002 to 2007.

directors.reportedDsg: Chief Executive Officer and Managing Director
directors.profile: Salil Parekh has over 30 years of global experience in the IT services industry.
Kiran Mazumdar-Shaw is the Chairperson and Managing Director of Biocon Limited.
D. Sundaram is a Chartered Accountant and has served as the Vice Chairman of Hindustan Unilever Limited.
Michael Gibbs is the former Group CIO for BP PLC and has over 30 years of experience in the oil and gas industry.
